seoDescription: Latest news, product releases, and updates from Cincon. Stay informed about new power module technologies and applications.

faqs.question: Where can I find the latest Cincon product announcements?
faqs.answer: BeiLuo provides the latest Cincon product announcements and updates on our website. As an authorized distributor, we receive advance notice of new product releases, technical updates, and discontinuation notices. Subscribe to our newsletter or check this page regularly for updates. For immediate notifications, contact our sales team to be added to our product alert list.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to subscribe to product alerts and newsletters.

faqs.question: How do I get notified about Cincon product changes?
faqs.answer: To receive notifications about Cincon product changes, contact BeiLuo sales team and request to be added to our product notification list. We provide alerts for: New product releases, Product discontinuations, Specification changes, Price updates, and Technical bulletins. You can also subscribe to our quarterly newsletter which includes product highlights and industry news.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact sales to subscribe to product change notifications.

articles.title: Cincon Launches New EC4A Series DC-DC Converters
articles.summary: Cincon introduces the EC4A series of 4W DC-DC converters with ultra-wide 4:1 input range, ideal for battery-powered applications.
articles.content: Cincon has announced the new EC4A series of isolated DC-DC converters, offering 4W output power with an ultra-wide 4:1 input voltage range. The series is designed for battery-powered applications where input voltage varies significantly during discharge cycles. Key features include 9-36V and 18-75V input options, 3.3V to 24V outputs, 1500VDC isolation, and -40°C to +85°C operation. The compact SIP8 package is ideal for space-constrained designs. Contact BeiLuo for samples and pricing.

articles.title: Cincon Medical Power Modules Achieve Updated IEC 60601-1 Certification
articles.summary: Cincon's medical-grade DC-DC converters now certified to IEC 60601-1 3rd Edition, ensuring compliance for patient-connected equipment.
articles.content: Cincon has completed certification of its medical-grade EC2M and EC3M series DC-DC converters to the latest IEC 60601-1 3rd Edition standard. These converters feature 2xMOPP (Means of Patient Protection) isolation with 5000VAC isolation voltage and ultra-low leakage current of less than 2µA. The certification covers all models in the series, providing medical device manufacturers with pre-certified power solutions that simplify regulatory approval. Contact BeiLuo for certification documentation and samples.

articles.title: Cincon Expands Railway Power Module Portfolio
articles.summary: New EC7A series railway-certified DC-DC converters extend Cincon's offerings for rolling stock applications.
articles.content: Cincon has expanded its railway power module portfolio with the new EC7A series, certified to EN 50155 for railway rolling stock applications. The series offers 8W to 40W output power with ultra-wide 14.4-154VDC input range, accommodating all standard railway battery systems. Features include -40°C to +85°C operation, 3000VDC isolation, and compliance with EN 50121-3-2 EMC standards. The rugged DIP packages are designed to withstand severe railway environmental conditions including vibration, shock, and temperature extremes.
